person.name: John Fettiplace
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
John Fettiplace had four sons- Richard, Anthony, Thomas, and William, and a daughter, Margaret. From Richard and Anthony descend all branches of the landed Fettiplace family aside from the original family of North Denchworth; all of these branches were extinct by 1806.

1. Richard Fettiplace (died 1510), of Shefford, married Elizabeth, daughter of William Besils, of Besselsleigh (then also 'Besils Leigh'), Berkshire. This estate remained in the family for five generations, then sold on the extinction of this line; a branch of this family were the Fettiplaces of Fernham, Berkshire, also extinct by 1720. One of its members was the politician John Fettiplace.
2. Anthony Fettiplace (died 1510), of Swinbrook, Oxfordshire and Childrey, Berkshire, was Esquire of the Body to Henry VII, and Sheriff of Berkshire in 1497. His wife, Mary, was sister of Sir Adrian Fortescue and granddaughter of Sir Geoffrey Boleyn, Lord Mayor of London. Anthony Fettiplace's descendants included the baronetical line established with John Fettiplace, extinct in 1743. Anthony's grandson William was founder of the cadet branch of Swyncombe, Oxfordshire, extinct at the death of Francis Englefield Fettiplace.
3. Thomas Fettiplace, of Compton Beauchamp, Berkshire, a knight, accompanied the King to the Field of the Cloth of Gold to meet the French King, Francis I in 1520. His only issue was a daughter, who married the courtier Sir Francis Englefield.
4. William Fettiplace, of Letcombe, Berkshire, married Elizabeth Waring, widow of John Kentwood, but had no issue.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fettiplace

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fettiplace於1427年8月出生在英國波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Fettiplace30歲，母親Beatrice Pinto30歲。他於1459年與Jane Fabian在英國英格蘭波克夏爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國被列為squire to henry iv。他去世於1464年8月1日在英國巴金哈姆爾享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾拉斯賀波利。

nameMeanings.name: Fettiplace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from the Anglo-Norman French phrase fete place ‘make room’, perhaps for an usher.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fettiplace was born in August 1427, in East Shefford, Berkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Fettiplace, was 30 and his mother, Beatrice Pinto, was 30. He married Jane Fabian in 1459, in Childrey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as squire to henry iv in England. He died on 1 August 1464, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fettiplace est né en août 1427, à East Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Fettiplace, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Pinto, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Jane Fabian en 1459, à Childrey, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est squire to henry iv à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 août 1464, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1459 in Childrey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Fabian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als squire to henry iv in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. August 1464 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Jane Fabian nel 1459, nel Childrey, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come squire to henry iv nel England. ja.lifeSummary: John Fettiplaceが1427年8月にイギリスバークシュアイアエアスト シェフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Fettiplaceは30歳，母Beatrice Pintoは30歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアチルドリーでJane Fabianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスでの職業はsquire to henry ivと記録されている。彼は1464年8月1日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fettiplace(이)가 1427년 8월 영국 버크실르 이스트 셰퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Fettiplace(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Pinto(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치드리에서 Jane Fabian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 squire to henry iv이었다. 그는 1464년 8월 1일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 래스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fettiplace nasceu em agosto de 1427, em East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Fettiplace, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Pinto, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Fabian em 1459, em Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como squire to henry iv em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1464, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fettiplace родился август 1427 г. в местности эаст шеффорд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Fettiplace было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Pinto, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Fabian в 1459 г. в местности чаилдри, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии squire to henry iv в местности Англия. Он умер 1 августа 1464 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности латбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fettiplace nació en agosto de 1427, en East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Fettiplace, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Beatrice Pinto, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Jane Fabian en 1459, en Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era squire to henry iv en Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1464, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Lathbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
